title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入奥地利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入奧地利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage documentation against Austria (ASI / E-Control / APG) requirements for EU CE framework compliance (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU, and Battery Regulation 2023/1542), transport, safety, grid interconnection, and destination-country due-diligence expectations. Austria is landlocked; sea freight routes via Hamburg (Germany), Koper (Slovenia), or Trieste (Italy). OVE electrotechnical rules and German-language documentation requirements apply alongside EU directives.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与奥地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）基于欧盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及欧盟电池法规2023/1542）、运输、安全、并网和尽责管理要求的差距对照。奥地利为内陆国，海运须经汉堡（德国）、科佩尔（斯洛文尼亚）或的里雅斯特（意大利）港口中转。OVE电工技术规则及德语文件要求与欧盟指令并行适用。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與奧地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）基於歐盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及歐盟電池法規2023/1542）、運輸、安全、併網和盡責管理要求的差距對照。奧地利為內陸國，海運須經漢堡（德國）、科佩爾（斯洛維尼亞）或的里雅斯特（義大利）港口中轉。OVE電工技術規則及德語文件要求與歐盟指令並行適用。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Austria (ASI / E-Control / APG) requirements, EU CE directives, OVE electrotechnical rules, grid requirements, and destination-country requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、危险货物分类、海关裁定、并网审批或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行奥地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）及欧盟相关法规的要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、危險貨物分類、海關裁定、併網核准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行奧地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）及歐盟相關法規的要求。

answer_first.en: For Austria, the practical entry barriers are mainly EU CE conformity execution (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU where applicable, plus Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 lifecycle and due-diligence duties), E-Control / APG grid-interconnection documentation, and ASI / market-acceptance alignment. Austria is a landlocked EU member state; sea freight routes via Hamburg, Koper, or Trieste. OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules apply alongside EU directives, and German-language documentation is often expected. The grid is 230/400 V 50 Hz — voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
answer_first.zh: 对于奥地利，主要入门门槛是执行欧盟CE合规路径（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要时RED 2014/53/EU，以及欧盟电池法规2023/1542的生命周期与尽责管理义务）、E-Control/APG并网文件要求，以及ASI与市场验收衔接。奥地利为欧盟内陆国，海运须经汉堡、科佩尔或的里雅斯特港口；OVE（奥地利电工协会）电工技术规则与欧盟指令并行适用，通常亦需提供德语文件。电网为230/400 V、50 Hz，电压与中国220/380 V基线不同。
answer_first.zht: 對於奧地利，主要入門門檻是執行歐盟CE合規路徑（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要時RED 2014/53/EU，以及歐盟電池法規2023/1542之生命周期與盡責管理義務）、E-Control/APG併網文件要求，以及ASI與市場驗收接軌。奧地利為歐盟內陸國，海運須經漢堡、科佩爾或的里雅斯特港口；OVE（奧地利電工協會）電工技術規則與歐盟指令並行適用，通常亦需提供德語文件。電網為230/400 V、50 Hz，電壓與中國220/380 V基線不同。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
